DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CLEUSENIR DIAS' MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF CHRISTINA SANTANA AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS SHALL PRODUCE MS. SANTANA FOR DEPOSITION WITHIN TEN DAYS UNLESS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AGREES TO A LATER DATE CERTAIN. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOM COHEN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition Of Christina Santana And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CLEUSENIR DIAS Motion To Compel Deposition Of Christina Santana And Request For Sanctions is transferred to be heard on the Discovery calendar in room 301 at 9:00 a.m. on the same date. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/EHG)

Plaintiff Cleusenir Dias' Motion To Compel Deposition Of Christina Santana And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carlos Huet-Cox of Dunn & Panagotacos LLP telephone number (415) 982-2100 for Plaintiff.

Counsel for the Plaintiff stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was not argued. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. Plaintiff Cleusenir Dias' Motion To Compel Deposition Of Christina Santana And Request For Sanctions is granted as follows: Defendants shall produce Ms. Santana for deposition within ten days unless Plaintiff's counsel agrees to a later date certain. Sanctions are awarded against defendants in the amount of $2,000. Order for the same signed in open Court.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
